common.githubAria: GitHub — gustavorh profile (opens in a new tab)

metadata.siteTitleDefault: CeroPDF — PDFs in the browser, free and private
metadata.siteDescription: Merge, split, and optimize PDFs in seconds. Free, no account, 100% in your device — your files are never uploaded for processing.

hero.title: Free PDF tools that never upload your files to the cloud.
hero.subtitle: Merge, split, and organize your PDFs in seconds. All processing happens in your browser: no account, no server, no trace.

footer.tagline: Your PDFs, your machine. No cloud uploads.
footer.subtagline: Merge and optimize in seconds, free and account-free.

merge.name: Merge PDF
merge.description: Combine multiple PDFs into one. Reorder, rotate, and exclude pages before exporting.

split.name: Split PDF
split.description: Separate a PDF by page ranges or extract pages into individual files.

edit.name: Edit PDF
edit.description: Add text, rectangles, and highlights on top of your PDF. Annotations are burned in on export.

extract.name: Extract pages
extract.description: Pick specific pages and produce a brand-new PDF containing only those.

compress.name: Compress PDF
compress.description: Shrink file size while keeping text and images readable. Great for email. Optional server-side.

officeToPdf.name: Office to PDF
officeToPdf.description: Convert Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and OpenDocument files to PDF with LibreOffice. Optional server-side.

mediaConvert.name: Convert audio & video
mediaConvert.description: Convert between MP3, WAV, OGG, M4A, FLAC, Opus, MP4, and WebM. 100% in your browser with ffmpeg.wasm.

imageConvert.name: PDF ↔ Images
imageConvert.description: Export each page as JPG/PNG or turn a set of images into a PDF.

secure.name: Protect PDF
secure.description: Add a password or watermark, or strip protection from a PDF you already have.
